steps.title: Use the standard-feature clue
steps.content: The passage says minarets are almost always included in mosque designs and calls them standard features. The blank needs a word for a distinctive, identifying feature.

steps.title: Choose the feature word
steps.content: "Hallmark" means a characteristic or identifying feature. B means refusal, C means a reason for action, and D means a copy, none of which describes a standard architectural feature. The answer is A.
